literature-report-plan.name: R3-federated-multisite

metadata.title: Federated Learning and Multi-Site Data Architecture for Preclinical Neurovascular Imaging

literature-report-plan.invocation-prompt:
create literature report on "Federated Learning and Multi-Site Data Architecture for Preclinical Neurovascular Imaging"
Focus: MONAI FL vs NVIDIA FLARE for 3D segmentation. Privacy-preserving multi-institutional training for 2-photon microscopy data. Domain shift between imaging sites (different microscopes, staining protocols, species). Opt-in data pooling architecture with anonymization gates. How federated learning changes the factorial design (site as additional factor). Preclinical vs clinical FL differences. Flower vs MONAI FL comparison.
Context: This repo uses MONAI as its ecosystem (TOP-1 principle). MONAI FL is the natural fit. The dataset is MiniVess (70 rat cortical vasculature volumes from a single site). Future work needs multi-site generalization.
EXCLUDED topics: - Single-site post-training methods (report R1) - Single-site ensemble selection (report R2) - Agentic AI (report 5) - FDA/regulatory details beyond privacy (report R4)
Repo context: /home/petteri/Dropbox/github-personal/minivess-mlops KG domains to update: data, operations, cloud Manuscript section: Discussion: Multi-Site Generalization (future work)

seed-papers.paper: Pati et al. (2022). "Federated learning enables big data for rare cancer boundary detection." Nature Communications 13, 7346. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-022-33407-5
Li et al. (2020). "Federated Optimization in Heterogeneous Networks." MLSys. https://arxiv.org/abs/1812.06127

Sheller et al. (2020). "Federated learning in medicine: facilitating multi-institutional collaborations without sharing patient data." Scientific Reports 10, 12598. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-020-69250-1
Beutel et al. (2020). "Flower: A Friendly Federated Learning Framework." arXiv. https://arxiv.org/abs/2007.14390
Roth et al. (2020). "NVIDIA FLARE: Federated Learning from Simulation to Real-World." arXiv. https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.13291
Poon et al. (2023). "A dataset of rodent cerebrovasculature." Scientific Data 10, 141. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-023-02048-8
Guan & Liu (2021). "Domain Adaptation for Medical Image Analysis." IEEE RBME 15, 103-115. https://doi.org/10.1109/RBME.2021.3098890
Kairouz et al. (2021). "Advances and Open Problems in Federated Learning." Foundations and Trends in ML 14(1-2). https://arxiv.org/abs/1912.04977

search-domains.domain: domain shift microscopy imaging federated training
